/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/DeltaClock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/KeyboardHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/MouseHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Shapes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/new_main.cpp.o -o main  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a libglad.a /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl
